evals.prompt: 评测执行要求：不要调用 Claude 的 Skill 工具来加载 ctd-32s73-stability-template-fill；请直接读取并遵循当前仓库根目录下的 SKILL.md 以及其引用的 references/、assets/templates/、assets/table-prototypes/ 和 scripts/ 文件。必须通过 scripts/skill_step.py 提交 ctd-32s73-step-event-v1 事件启动、恢复和继续流程；不得直接调用 run_state_machine_workflow.py、prepare_generation_workspace.py、run_generation_pipeline.py、render_stability_tables.py、validate_fact_packet.py、validate_generated_docx.py、趋势图或 OCR 内部副作用脚本；不得编写一次性脚本绕过 step/FSM。不得修改 skill 源码、模板资产或 references 文档。所有生成文件必须保存到评测指定的 outputs 目录。使用 skill ctd-32s73-stability-template-fill，为项目 IP350 生成 3.2.S.7.3 稳定性数据 Word 文档。项目目录：${CTD_EVAL_FIXTURE_ROOT}\3.2.S.7.3-IP350。只能使用参考文件1-项目基本信息收集表.docx、参考文件2-原液稳定性考察方案.docx、参考文件3-原液和成品影响因素试验考察报告.docx、参考文件4-稳定性试验数据汇总.xlsx 作为事实来源。禁止读取、引用或借鉴 已完成的申报资料-32s73-稳定性数据.docx，也不要读取 Word 临时锁文件 ~$成的申报资料-32s73-稳定性数据.docx。使用 skill 自带模板，保持模板段落样式、表格结构、合并单元格、表注和图表标题格式。输出 filled DOCX、evidence summary、validation report 和结构快照。
evals.expected_output: 生成 IP350 的 3.2.S.7.3 稳定性数据 DOCX，并附证据摘要、验证报告、结构快照；不得使用已完成申报资料作为事实来源。

assertions.text: Output bundle includes a filled DOCX, evidence summary, validation report, and generated structure snapshot.
Evidence summary states the active template path and confirms the bundled template was used.
Evidence summary lists the completed submission document as excluded and not read or used as a fact source.
Generated DOCX contains IP350-supported product expression, batch numbers, long-term condition, accelerated condition, and stress-study conditions from the allowed reference files.
Generated DOCX contains no unresolved XXX, IPXXX, or 单抗/原液 placeholders unless explicitly justified in validation.
Validation report includes representative paragraph style checks and table gridSpan/vMerge checks.
Evidence summary lists every allowed reference file from the prompt as a used source or explicitly explains why a listed source was not usable.
Output directory contains at least one .docx file for the filled document.
Output directory contains an evidence summary file and a validation report file.
Output directory contains a generated structure snapshot or the validation report explicitly explains why no snapshot was produced.

Final outputs do not remain in scaffold-only state: fact-packet is not pending_fact_extraction, evidence summary does not say pending extraction, and validation report is not only an Initial scaffold validation report.
If validation.json is present, it records placeholder, section, table-structure, template-comparison, evidence-summary, scaffold-state, validation-report, and caption-reference checks.
If generated DOCX text contains referenced table or figure numbers without matching captions, the validation report lists them as manual-refresh or numbering-gap items.

If source evidence supports only one target batch, generated DOCX shrinks the bundled two-batch template by deleting second-batch long-term, accelerated, and stress-study tables plus related captions, references, and directory entries.
Single-batch outputs do not copy first-batch results into a nonexistent second batch and do not keep blank second-batch template tables merely to preserve table count.
Validation report records any batch-count shrink from the bundled two-batch template, including table-count, numbering, directory, and manual-refresh implications.
Validation report explains every warning emitted by validation.json instead of ignoring failed checks.

Output directory contains fact-packet.json with schema_version ctd-32s73-fact-packet-v1 and required top-level keys: project_profile, sources, long_term, accelerated, stress_study, trend_charts, docx_render_plan, missing_evidence, and manual_review_items.
Output directory contains fact-packet-validation.json, or validation report shows scripts/validate_fact_packet.py was run and explains any fact-packet validation warnings.
fact-packet project_profile stores batches as a list and does not rely on ds_batch, main_batch, or first_batch scalar fields to drive rendering.

fact-packet docx_render_plan.render_scope records source_batch_count, rendered_batches, omitted_batches, and batch_structure_action; single-batch shrink does not remove source-confirmed batches from project_profile.batches or fabricate a second batch.

fact-packet table_render_inputs for long-term, accelerated, and applicable stress-study tables include role, batch_no, time_header points, and rows. target_table_index is not required because table blocks are generated from structural placeholders. Stress-study rows provide the first column as test item plus method and the second column as quality standard or an explicit no-standard marker.

Stress-study table_render_inputs are not empty: every rendered stress/influence-factor table has non-empty rows with item, method, acceptance or quality_standard, values, role, batch_no, and time_header points.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables keep a two-column left data area: first column is test item plus method, second column is quality standard; acceptance is not concatenated into the first column or dropped.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables have the header 检测指标 merged across the two left columns and vertically merged across the first two header rows: row 0 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=restart; row 1 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=continue.
Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables place only time-point labels in the second header row to the right of 检测指标, and the time header gridSpan equals the number of time points.

Evidence summary lists the completed submission document as excluded and not read or used as a fact source.

fact-packet docx_render_plan.render_scope keeps all source-confirmed IP248A batches in project_profile.batches, declares rendered_batches and omitted_batches explicitly, and sets batch_structure_action=expand for three rendered batches.
The added IP248A third-batch tables contain the third batch's own values or explicit missing-data markers, not copied second-batch results.
Body text, table captions, table directory entries or manual-refresh notes include the added batch tables.
table-render-manifest.json declares generated_table_slots, and each rendered IP248A table matches the generated role, batch_no, table_index, and caption_no from structural table block placeholders.

For the three-batch IP248A structure, table numbering is role-block ordered: long-term 1-3, accelerated 4-6, then stress-study roles continue by batch without appending all third-batch tables to the document end.
Newly cloned tables preserve representative paragraph styles, gridSpan, vMerge, column widths, and table notes.
Evidence summary lists every allowed reference file from the prompt as a used source or explicitly explains why a listed source was not usable.
Output directory contains at least one .docx file for the filled document.
Output directory contains an evidence summary file and a validation report file.
Output directory contains a generated structure snapshot or the validation report explicitly explains why no snapshot was produced.

If generated DOCX text contains referenced table or figure numbers without matching captions, the validation report lists them as manual-refresh or numbering-gap items.

If source evidence supports only one target batch, generated DOCX shrinks the bundled two-batch template by deleting second-batch long-term, accelerated, and stress-study tables plus related captions, references, and directory entries.
Single-batch outputs do not copy first-batch results into a nonexistent second batch and do not keep blank second-batch template tables merely to preserve table count.
Validation report records any batch-count shrink from the bundled two-batch template, including table-count, numbering, directory, and manual-refresh implications.
Validation report explains every warning emitted by validation.json instead of ignoring failed checks.

Output directory contains fact-packet.json with schema_version ctd-32s73-fact-packet-v1 and required top-level keys: project_profile, sources, long_term, accelerated, stress_study, trend_charts, docx_render_plan, missing_evidence, and manual_review_items.
Output directory contains fact-packet-validation.json, or validation report shows scripts/validate_fact_packet.py was run and explains any fact-packet validation warnings.
fact-packet project_profile stores batches as a list and does not rely on ds_batch, main_batch, or first_batch scalar fields to drive rendering.

fact-packet table_render_inputs for long-term, accelerated, and applicable stress-study tables include role, batch_no, time_header points, and rows. target_table_index is not required because table blocks are generated from structural placeholders. Stress-study rows provide the first column as test item plus method and the second column as quality standard or an explicit no-standard marker.

Stress-study table_render_inputs are not empty: every rendered stress/influence-factor table has non-empty rows with item, method, acceptance or quality_standard, values, role, batch_no, and time_header points.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables keep a two-column left data area: first column is test item plus method, second column is quality standard; acceptance is not concatenated into the first column or dropped.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables have the header 检测指标 merged across the two left columns and vertically merged across the first two header rows: row 0 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=restart; row 1 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=continue.
Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables place only time-point labels in the second header row to the right of 检测指标, and the time header gridSpan equals the number of time points.

evals.prompt: 评测执行要求：不要调用 Claude 的 Skill 工具来加载 ctd-32s73-stability-template-fill；请直接读取并遵循当前仓库根目录下的 SKILL.md 以及其引用的 references/、assets/templates/、assets/table-prototypes/ 和 scripts/ 文件。必须通过 scripts/skill_step.py 提交 ctd-32s73-step-event-v1 事件启动、恢复和继续流程；不得直接调用 run_state_machine_workflow.py、prepare_generation_workspace.py、run_generation_pipeline.py、render_stability_tables.py、validate_fact_packet.py、validate_generated_docx.py、趋势图或 OCR 内部副作用脚本；不得编写一次性脚本绕过 step/FSM。不得修改 skill 源码、模板资产或 references 文档。所有生成文件必须保存到评测指定的 outputs 目录。使用 skill ctd-32s73-stability-template-fill，为项目 IP177 生成 3.2.S.7.3 稳定性数据 Word 文档。项目目录：${CTD_EVAL_FIXTURE_ROOT}\3.2.S.7.3-IP177。只能使用参考文件2-STB(C)-QC-IP177-P-2-001-1.0  IP177原液稳定性考察方案.pdf、参考文件3-STB(C)-QC-IP177-R-2-001-1.0  IP177原液稳定性考察报告.docx、参考文件3-STB(C)-QC-IP177-R-2-001-1.0  IP177原液稳定性考察报告.pdf、参考文件4-TP-AD-IP177-1-015-00 IP177原液和成品影响因素试验考察方案.docx、参考文件4-TP-AD-IP177-1-015-00 IP177原液和成品影响因素试验考察方案.pdf、参考文件5-TR-AD-IP177-1-012-00  IP177原液和成品影响因素试验考察报告.docx、参考文件5-TR-AD-IP177-1-012-00 IP177原因和成品影响因素试验考察报告.pdf 作为事实来源。禁止读取、引用或借鉴 已完成的申报资料-3.2.S.7.3 稳定性数据.docx。使用 skill 自带模板，保持模板段落样式、表格结构、合并单元格、表注和图表标题格式。若项目缺少基本信息表，应从稳定性考察报告和方案中提取可追溯事实，无法确认的内容写入 missing-evidence report，不要猜测。输出 filled DOCX、evidence summary、validation report、missing-evidence report 和结构快照。
evals.expected_output: 生成 IP177 的 3.2.S.7.3 稳定性数据 DOCX，并附证据摘要、验证报告、缺失证据报告和结构快照；不得使用已完成申报资料作为事实来源。

assertions.text: Output bundle includes a filled DOCX, evidence summary, validation report, missing-evidence report, and generated structure snapshot.
Evidence summary lists the completed submission document as excluded and not read or used as a fact source.
Missing or uncertain project identity fields are surfaced in the missing-evidence report instead of guessed.
Stability conclusions are based on report/workbook data and completed time points, not planned-only protocol time points.
Generated DOCX does not infer product identity, specification, or batch role from the excluded completed submission when the basic information table is absent.
Validation report includes unresolved placeholder checks, unrelated-source residue checks, and representative table structure checks.
Evidence summary lists every allowed reference file from the prompt as a used source or explicitly explains why a listed source was not usable.
Output directory contains at least one .docx file for the filled document.
Output directory contains an evidence summary file and a validation report file.
Output directory contains a generated structure snapshot or the validation report explicitly explains why no snapshot was produced.

Final outputs do not remain in scaffold-only state: fact-packet is not pending_fact_extraction, evidence summary does not say pending extraction, and validation report is not only an Initial scaffold validation report.
If validation.json is present, it records placeholder, section, table-structure, template-comparison, evidence-summary, scaffold-state, validation-report, and caption-reference checks.
If generated DOCX text contains referenced table or figure numbers without matching captions, the validation report lists them as manual-refresh or numbering-gap items.

If source evidence supports only one target batch, generated DOCX shrinks the bundled two-batch template by deleting second-batch long-term, accelerated, and stress-study tables plus related captions, references, and directory entries.
Single-batch outputs do not copy first-batch results into a nonexistent second batch and do not keep blank second-batch template tables merely to preserve table count.
Validation report records any batch-count shrink from the bundled two-batch template, including table-count, numbering, directory, and manual-refresh implications.
Validation report explains every warning emitted by validation.json instead of ignoring failed checks.

Output directory contains fact-packet.json with schema_version ctd-32s73-fact-packet-v1 and required top-level keys: project_profile, sources, long_term, accelerated, stress_study, trend_charts, docx_render_plan, missing_evidence, and manual_review_items.
Output directory contains fact-packet-validation.json, or validation report shows scripts/validate_fact_packet.py was run and explains any fact-packet validation warnings.
fact-packet project_profile stores batches as a list and does not rely on ds_batch, main_batch, or first_batch scalar fields to drive rendering.

fact-packet table_render_inputs for long-term, accelerated, and applicable stress-study tables include role, batch_no, time_header points, and rows. target_table_index is not required because table blocks are generated from structural placeholders. Stress-study rows provide the first column as test item plus method and the second column as quality standard or an explicit no-standard marker.

Stress-study table_render_inputs are not empty: every rendered stress/influence-factor table has non-empty rows with item, method, acceptance or quality_standard, values, role, batch_no, and time_header points.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables keep a two-column left data area: first column is test item plus method, second column is quality standard; acceptance is not concatenated into the first column or dropped.

Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables have the header 检测指标 merged across the two left columns and vertically merged across the first two header rows: row 0 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=restart; row 1 col 0 gridSpan=2 vMerge=continue.
Rendered stress/influence-factor DOCX tables place only time-point labels in the second header row to the right of 检测指标, and the time header gridSpan equals the number of time points.
